name: DriverApplicationOrderAttributes
description: Transaction metadata profile for driver hiring application orders.

privacy_notes.note: Passport reference URI. Protect in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest. Log all access and disclosure events. Minimum disclosure stage: init.
Credential reference number (licence number, verification ID). Treat as PII. Do not index or log.
Signed URL to credential document. PII — access-controlled with URL expiry. Share only after driver consent.
